name: Pregnancy-Related Exclusion Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for pregnancy, childbirth, and puerperium. Used as exclusion criteria in certain HEDIS measures where pregnancy may confound measure results (e.g., diabetes control, BP control).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Supervision of high risk pregnancy, unspecified, unspecified trimester
Gestational diabetes mellitus in pregnancy, diet controlled
Gestational diabetes mellitus in pregnancy, insulin controlled
Gestational diabetes mellitus in pregnancy, unspecified control
Gestational hypertension without significant proteinuria, first trimester
Gestational hypertension without significant proteinuria, unspecified trimester
Mild to moderate pre-eclampsia, unspecified trimester
Twin pregnancy, unspecified number of placenta and amniotic sacs, first trimester
Encounter for supervision of normal first pregnancy, unspecified trimester
Encounter for supervision of other normal pregnancy, unspecified trimester
